localizations.title: Inside the Mind of Sherlock Holmes
localizations.hint_8_first: Connect the 8 clue cards to this one using the red thread. Sherlock has told you the first and last cards to use. All you have to do is put the rest together and follow the story.
localizations.hint_8: The cards, when put in the proper order, form a series of mathematical operations with numbers, as well as plus and minus symbols. Just do the operations one at a time.
localizations.hint_11: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_12: Try to find the poison somewhere nearby.
localizations.hint_15: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_16: The chemist seems to have something to tell you. Question him to find out what.
localizations.hint_25: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_29: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_30_first: The best way to find out if there's a dog nearby is to use one of your senses.
localizations.hint_30: Sherlock has keen hearing. Use his mind to locate the dog.
localizations.hint_31: Find an elevated spot with which you can combine this card.
localizations.hint_32: There's only one way to determine if the label came from the bottle.
localizations.hint_33_first: Amara used the contents of these bottles to spray a mist of flammable liquid from her mouth. Perhaps the poison Watson spoke of is connected to the bottles.
localizations.hint_33: Use Sherlock's mind to sniff the contents of these bottles.
localizations.hint_43: Watson spoke of a poison. It's time to find out what it is.
localizations.hint_45: The bank manager has pointed you in the right direction. Using the Covent Garden card inside Sherlock's mind, you should be able to find it.
localizations.hint_50: Here are two more witnesses that you can interrogate.
localizations.hint_55_first: There must be a chemist's shop in Covent Garden. Sherlock knows the place by heart.
localizations.hint_55: Look for a map inside Sherlock's mind.
localizations.hint_71_first: Watson is right. Inhaling the fumes of these smelling salts will undoubtedly revive you.
localizations.hint_71: Use your sense of smell to inhale the fumes.
localizations.hint_81_first: Sherlock is disoriented. Perhaps repeating the last steps of his journey in his mind will help him remember what happened.
localizations.hint_81: What did you do after you climbed onto the balcony?
localizations.hint_87: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_94: This clue will come in handy once you've collected them all. Until then, keep searching.
localizations.hint_99: Use Sherlock's mind to take a closer look.
localizations.hint_100: The idea on this card is useless on its own. You must find another idea and use them together.
localizations.hint_101_first: The two cards combine. Insert them into the case to find the number.
localizations.hint_101: First, insert Idea 1 (A) into the box, then slide Idea 2 (B) in front of it down to the line.
localizations.hint_oreille: Explore your surroundings and listen for sounds.
localizations.hint_oeil: Someone tried to kill you. You must wake up!
localizations.answer_hint_8: Enter the number 17 to unlock the "Grand Finale" padlock.
localizations.answer_hint_31: Combine this card with the balcony's modifier (+68). 31 + 68 = 99
localizations.answer_hint_32: Combine the label (55) and the bottle (32). 55 + 32 = 87
localizations.answer_hint_33: Sniff the bottles (33) using Sherlock's nose (10). 33 + 10 = 43
localizations.answer_hint_43: Combine this card (43) with Watson's statement (12). 43 + 12 = 55
localizations.answer_hint_45: Combine this card (45) with the map (+30) = 45 + 30 = 75
localizations.answer_hint_55: Combine this card (55) with the map (+30) = 45 + 30 = 85
localizations.answer_hint_71: Combine this card (71) with Sherlock's nose (+10). 71 + 10 = 81
localizations.answer_hint_81: Use Sherlock's eyes once more on card 99.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Use Sherlock's eyes on this card.
localizations.answer_hint_101: Placing both cards in the case makes the number 31 appear.
localizations.answer_hint_oreille: Slowly move your device around until you hear barking.
localizations.machine_sherlockhead_eye: "Ah, yes. I entered in through the balcony, where I was then able to sneak discreetly into the kitchens."
localizations.machine_temoignage_watson: Watson: "I was watching her for an hour while I was waiting for you. Her performance was excellent. She had just returned from a break when you arrived, and was about to start her next act. Nobody came close to her before she died, of that I'm certain!"
localizations.machine_temoignage_plumb: Plumb: "Yes, I am the president of the Covent Garden Merchants Committee. We've been dealing with all sorts of problems because of these acrobats and carnival folk hanging around. We won't stand for it any more! These miscreants are defacing our facades. Take the street to the east and see for yourself!"
localizations.machine_temoignage_holmwood: Holmwood: "I've been robbed! When I opened my shop this morning, I noticed that the bottle of cyanide was missing. I don't understand it, though; there was no sign of a break-in. I am very concerned; even the smallest amount can be lethal!"
localizations.machine_temoignage_sefu: Sefu: "I am devastated by what happened. Amara was part of our troupe, and everyone liked her. The situation has been tense with some of the local merchants lately, but performances here are an old tradition of the market. Still, I can't believe anyone would have wanted to kill her."
localizations.machine_temoignage_cleo: Cleo: "Oh, it's terrible! Amara was like a sister to me. Yes, that dog was hers, and we keep him with us, along with her supply of kerosene, as well as our own belongings. I saw her pass by just a few moments ago while Sefu and I were in the middle of our act. She went to get some supplies from the reserve, then returned to her usual place."
localizations.machine_temoignage_strand: Strand: "I can't abide these people any longer - these anarchists calling themselves the Bloody Thorn. All they do is make trouble, defacing our streets, and then they scatter like rats. And do they stop with just the facades? No! We are seeing more and more accidents and outright violence. But they don't have a monopoly on that! If I manage to catch one, they're going to have a rough time of it!"
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q1_wrong: Of course not, Watson. Look closely at the marks on my neck (81)! These marks definitely came from a chain!
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q1_right: Good catch, Watson! The marks on my neck (81) leave little doubt as to the method used.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_watson: You're hilarious, my dear Watson! Of course I know you aren't involved in any of this. Pray humor me and make another hypothesis.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_plumb: No, Watson! The merchants had no reason to sabotage their own meeting with poison. Cleo, on the other hand, belongs to the Bloody Thorn, as we can tell by her tattoo. When she saw the Public Notice, she decided to take action by stealing the bottle and attempting the dangerous climb into the Café. She then returned to her place using the same route, hid the bottle, and resumed her performance.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_holmwood: No, Watson! The merchants had no reason to sabotage their own meeting with poison. Cleo, on the other hand, belongs to the Bloody Thorn, as we can tell by her tattoo. When she saw the Public Notice, she decided to take action by stealing the bottle and attempting the dangerous climb into the Café. She then returned to her place using the same route, hid the bottle, and resumed her performance.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_strand: No, Watson! The merchants had no reason to sabotage their own meeting with poison. Cleo, on the other hand, belongs to the Bloody Thorn, as we can tell by her tattoo. When she saw the Public Notice, she decided to take action by stealing the bottle and attempting the dangerous climb into the Café. She then returned to her place using the same route, hid the bottle, and resumed her performance.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_sefu: No, Watson! While Sefu is undoubtedly capable of such a climb, I believe the crime was committed by a member of the Bloody Thorn: his assistant, Cleo, who bears a tattoo with the same insignia. When she saw the Public Notice, she must have decided to take action by stealing the bottle and attempting the dangerous climb into the Café. She then returned to her place using the same route, hid the bottle, and resumed her performance.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2_cleo: Good catch, Watson! Cleo must be a member of the Bloody Thorn, as indicated by her tattoo. When she saw the Public Notice, she must have decided to take action by stealing the bottle and attempting the dangerous climb into the Café. She then returned to her place using the same route, hid the bottle, and resumed her performance.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q3_wrong: No, Watson! Amara's death was all an unfortunate accident. Cleo told us that Amara's belongings are kept along with her own. While Cleo and Sefu were performing their act, Amara came by to get another bottle of kerosene, as the ones she had been using were empty, as we discovered. Unfortunately, she mistakenly took the bottle of poison since the label had been torn off and thrown away. That's the end of it, Watson. At least we were able to prevent any more deaths.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q3_right: Yes, Watson! Amara's death was all an unfortunate accident. Cleo told us that Amara's belongings are kept along with her own. While Cleo and Sefu were performing their act, Amara came by to get another bottle of kerosene, as the ones she had been using were empty, as we discovered. Unfortunately, she mistakenly took the bottle of poison since the label had been torn off and thrown away. That's the end of it, Watson. At least we were able to prevent any more deaths.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_step1:
The Grand Finale!

There's no need to try to open this safe until you have all the clue cards, and know how to piece them together.
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q1: What was used in the attempt to strangle Holmes?
localizations.machine_grandfinal_q2: Who stole the cyanide and poisoned the tarts?
localizations.machine_grandfinal_step2:
It's time to answer Holmes' questions.

Be sure to look carefully at the cards and witness statements before answering each question.
localizations.machine_temoignage: When you encounter a witness, you can question them by entering their card number here. Watson's profile is already lit. Later, you can read any of their statements again by clicking on the profile of the witness you are interested in. Interrogating witnesses will gradually fill Sherlock's mind and help him form important ideas.
localizations.game_start_authors:
An adventure set in the universe of

Inside the Mind of Sherlock Holmes

by Cyril Lieron
& Benoît Dahan.
localizations.game_start_1: Throughout this adventure, you'll be able to navigate through the mind of the famous detective, Sherlock Holmes. Click on the different elements you see to solve the various puzzles you encounter.
localizations.game_start_2: Time will not be taken into account for your final score. Carefully read the clues and witness statements in order to solve the case.
localizations.game_start_3:
Important:
Throughout this adventure you will find several clues that are connected by a red thread. You do not need to assemble these elements until Sherlock asks you to do so.
localizations.machine_oreille: Close your eyes, Watson, and listen carefully to the sounds all around us.
